name: MVP - AI Podcast Video Clip Composer

parameters.formDescription: Upload cover, proof screenshot, and background video, then generate a two-speaker AI podcast clip.

values.placeholder: 输入你对这件事情的观点、角度或想表达的核心判断

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, jobId: $json.jobId, reviewDir: $json.reviewDir, videoPath: $json.videoPath, audioPath: $json.audioPath, subtitlePath: $json.subtitlePath, subtitleTimingPath: $json.subtitleTimingPath, transcriptPath: $json.transcriptPath, costPath: $json.costPath, podcastMetadataPath: $json.podcastMetadataPath, podcastRawResponsePath: $json.podcastRawResponsePath, ffmpegLog: $json.ffmpegLog, size: $json.size, generatedScriptTitle: $json.generatedScriptTitle, generatedScriptSummary: $json.generatedScriptSummary, generatedScriptText: $json.generatedScriptText, scriptMode: $json.scriptMode, selectedVoices: $json.selectedVoices, ttsDuration: $json.ttsDuration, cost: $json.cost } }}
